data.change_summary: No additional code edits were required in this apply-fixes round. The completion-round-6 review approved the milestone task-run lineage changes without amendments, so I left the implementation unchanged and carried forward the validated state from the latest reviewed build.
outstanding_risks: Milestone start and completion still span separate lineage, snapshot, and journal files without a cross-file transaction; retries now repair drift, but a crash between file writes can still leave snapshot or journal state temporarily behind `task-runs.ndjson` until the same operation is replayed.

steps.description: Reviewed the approved completion-round-6 validation output and confirmed there were no follow-up fixes or amendments to apply.
Left the existing milestone task-run lineage implementation unchanged because the approved review found no remaining defects requiring code changes.
Carried forward the approved validation evidence for formatting, milestone_record tests, and clippy from the latest reviewed implementation.

validation_evidence: Approved review evidence confirms `cargo fmt --all --check` passes with no formatting issues.
Approved review evidence confirms `cargo test --lib contexts::milestone_record` passes with 75 tests.
Approved review evidence confirms `cargo clippy -- -D warnings` passes cleanly.
